test.name: Unsubscribed-site request: URL generated with a login-wall warning, not blocked
test.description: researcher_profile.subscriptions lists only Ancestry. The user explicitly asks for MyHeritage. Per the skill's subscription rules the request is flagged but not blocked: generate the MyHeritage URL anyway, plus one line of context that the link will hit a login wall or limited preview, offering to continue or switch to a subscribed site.

input.user_message: Search MyHeritage for Patrick Flynn's marriage record in Pennsylvania, around 1865 to 1875.

judge_context: The researcher profile lists only an Ancestry subscription — the response should include a brief warning that the MyHeritage link will land on a login wall or limited-results preview, and offer the choice to continue or use a subscribed site

The MyHeritage URL must still be generated (flagged, not blocked) with myheritage.com/research query parameters filled from the subject (first Patrick, last Flynn, marriage window 1865-1875, Pennsylvania)
Should not lecture at length about subscriptions — the skill specifies one line of context, and FindAGrave-style free alternatives are optional suggestions, not replacements for the explicit request
A research-log entry must be written in the same turn the URL is generated: site myheritage, outcome partial, capture_received false
